name: perfectlittlebusiness
description: The Perfect Little Business plugin. Your AI Operating System (AIOS), installed in one move. It connects you to your Authority HQ portal, builds your AIOS Brain through five foundational tools (Avatar, Offer, Conviction, Brand, and Source of Truth) that run live from Authority HQ, sets up your file structure, stands up your Cowork OS dashboard, and installs the operating skills that keep the system self-improving: /start and /end for every session, /learn and /decide to capture what you discover, /hygiene to keep it healthy, and /how-to for anything else.
